title: Category Manager, Over-the-Counter (OTC) Product
description:
About The Company

We have partnered with one of the leading retail groups in Singapore with a strong presence across multiple store formats islandwide. With a portfolio of well-established brands, the business continues to grow and adapt, serving diverse customer segments though its network of over 50 outlets.

Job Summary

The successful candidate will be responsible for driving the growth and performance of assigned product categories through a structured category management approach. This role focuses on enhancing financial results, strengthening customer appeal, improving market competitiveness, and optimising overall category productivity.

This role is based in Tampines.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and execute strategic business plans to meet category sales, profit, and income targets.
  • Build and manage an effective product assortment based on customer needs and evolving market trends.
  • Plan and implement promotional activities that deliver excitement and incremental revenue.
  • Contribute to shrink reduction through effective purchasing and stock management practices.
  • Define placement strategies and planograms that enhance customer experience and improve product flow.
  • Formulate competitive pricing strategies that deliver strong customer value while meeting business goals.
  • Foster good supplier partnerships to maximise trading terms, discounts, and joint business opportunities.
  • Lead private label development within assigned categories to strengthen profitability and assortment differentiation.
  • Ensure adherence to company processes and policies, including stock ageing, write-off controls, and inventory discipline.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor's degree in Food Technology and/or any related field is preferred.
  • Pharmacist background is a plus.
  • Minimum 3 years of experience in Category Management, Procurement, and/or similar role.
  • Great commercial acumen with a track record of delivering sales and profit improvements.
  • Possesses solid knowledge and experience in sourcing or buying.
  • Demonstrates good communication and negotiation skills.
  • Excellent stakeholder management with the ability to build and maintain effective working relationship.

postedCompany.description:
At Elevon Consulting, we specialise in connecting proven talents with forward-thinking organisations across diverse industries.

Our mid to senior management recruitment practice focuses on identifying individuals with the strategic acumen, leadership capability, and commercial foresight to drive business growth. Whether you're hiring for department heads, functional leaders, or executive roles, we deliver candidates who combine hands-on experience with the vision to shape long-term success.

Through a consultative approach, market insight, and a strong professional network, we ensure every placement aligns with your culture, goals, and operational needs — empowering businesses to build capable, future-ready leadership teams.
postedCompany.name: ELEVON CONSULTING PTE. LTD.
